mapper.insert: INSERT INTO app_user_identity (user_id, identity_type, identity_key, credential_hash, verified, meta_json) VALUES (#{userId}, #{identityType}, #{identityKey}, #{credentialHash}, #{verified}, #{metaJson})
mapper.update: UPDATE app_user_identity SET credential_hash = #{credentialHash}, verified = #{verified}, meta_json = #{metaJson}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
